issues.description: Missing Blocker effect entirely. Card has two distinct effects: (1) Blocker keyword (Counter trigger on opponent's attack declaration), and (2) End of Turn effect to set DON cards active. DSL only captures a partial/incorrect action.
Trigger should be 'Counter' for Blocker mechanic (activated when opponent declares attack), not 'Activated'. Blocker is a response to OnAttack, not a manual activation.
Action 'GiveDon' is incorrect. Blocker effect should Rest this card ('Rest' action) to redirect attack target, not give DON. The DON setup is a separate end-of-turn effect.

Missing second effect for '[End of Your Turn] Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.' Should be a separate effect with trigger 'EndOfTurn' and action to set DON active (likely 'AttachDon' or equivalent state change).
